entries.title: Doom (shareware)
entries.description: Knee-Deep in the Dead — the full first episode of the original 1993 Doom, freely distributable shareware.
entries.note: Shareware: the engine blocks loading add-on files with this IWAD.

entries.title: Heretic (shareware)
entries.description: City of the Damned — the first episode of Raven Software's dark-fantasy shooter, shareware release.

entries.title: Hexen (demo)
entries.description: The four-map demo of Hexen: Beyond Heretic, with the Fighter, Cleric and Mage classes.

entries.title: Strife (demo)
entries.description: The free teaser of Strife, Rogue Entertainment's RPG-shooter hybrid set in a war-torn medieval future.

entries.title: Chex Quest
entries.description: The legendary 1996 cereal-box game: a kid-friendly total conversion where you zorch Flemoids instead of demons. Freeware.

entries.title: Chex Quest 3
entries.description: The official 2008 freeware sequel by original artist Charles Jacobi, bundling remastered versions of all three Chex Quest episodes.
